payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark-stained wooden side table with a rectangular top and straight square legs; tabletop holds stacked papers/magazine and a small potted plant, and the near corner shows scuffs and wear — appears close to the camera at approximately 0.7 meters away.
